nasb.text: He shall receive a blessing from the Lord And righteousness from the God of his salvation.

esv.text: He will receive blessing from the Lord and righteousness from the God of his salvation.

cnv.text: 他必領受從耶和華來的福分， 也必蒙拯救他的　神稱他為義。

ccb.text: 他们必蒙耶和华赐福， 被救他们的上帝称为义人。

csbs.text: 他必领受来自耶和华的祝福， 领受来自拯救他的神的公义。
